title: Seychelles Island Hopper – 7 Days
summary: Three islands: Mahé, Praslin, and La Digue – the ultimate granitic paradise.
description: Catamaran crossings, iconic beaches, Creole cuisine, and giant tortoises.
price_label: per person sharing (based on double occupancy)

days.title: Arrival Mahé – Beau Vallon Beach
days.summary: Transfer to villa, afternoon at leisure on one of Seychelles' best beaches.

days.title: Mahé Discovery – Victoria Market & Morne Seychellois
days.summary: Visit capital Victoria, then optional hike in the national park with panoramic views.

days.title: Ferry to Praslin – Vallée de Mai & Anse Lazio
days.summary: Morning catamaran to Praslin, UNESCO forest tour, afternoon at top-rated beach.

days.title: Praslin – Curieuse Island & St. Pierre (optional excursion)
days.summary: Optional full-day boat trip to see giant tortoises and snorkel with tropical fish.

days.title: Ferry to La Digue – Bicycle & Anse Source d'Argent
days.summary: Short ferry to La Digue, cycle to the world-famous granite boulder beach.

days.title: Praslin – Relax or Anse Georgette
days.summary: Free day to relax or hike to secluded Anse Georgette (requires permission).

days.title: Praslin – Mahé – Departure
days.summary: Morning ferry back to Mahé, transfer to international airport for flight home.
activities: Last minute souvenir at Praslin jetty
